welcome.title: Welcome to OmniRaw
welcome.subtitle: Culling tool with RAW/JPG lifecycle linking

browse.title: Browse
browse.empty: No folder opened yet. Click "Open Folder" to start scanning.
browse.summary: {{total}} groups: {{complete}} paired, {{rawOnly}} RAW only, {{nonRawOnly}} non-RAW only ({{skipped}} non-image files skipped)

cull.title: Cull
cull.empty: Open a folder in Browse first.
cull.hotkeys: ←/→ navigate · P/↑↓ cycle files in group · Del delete pair (again to undo) · J delete JPG only · R delete RAW only · Space mark current file · U unmark · Enter review · Esc back
cull.toggleFileMark: Checked = this file will be deleted

review.title: Review
review.empty: No photos are marked for deletion.
review.confirmMessage: {{files}} files across {{groups}} groups will be moved to the Recycle Bin (recoverable).
review.resultSuccess: {{count}} files moved to the Recycle Bin.

orphans.title: Orphan Cleanup
orphans.empty: Not scanned yet, or no orphan files found.
orphans.confirmMessage: {{files}} files will be moved to the Recycle Bin (recoverable).

settings.title: Settings
settings.defaultDeleteModeHint: Mark mode applied when pressing Delete while culling
settings.matchExportedSuffixesHint: Files like IMG_0001_edit.jpg join the IMG_0001 group automatically
settings.rescanHint: Extension list changes take effect after rescanning the folder.

errors.scanFailed: Scan failed — check that the folder is accessible.
